description_long: This is a metallic utility trolley with two flat rectangular shelves, supported by a tubular metal frame. The trolley features gently curved side supports and a handlebar at each end, allowing for easy maneuvering. Four small caster wheels are attached to the bottom, providing mobility across smooth surfaces. The upper and lower shelves are bordered by raised edges to prevent items from sliding off. The overall finish is sleek and reflective, suggesting a stainless steel or chrome-plated construction. The design is utilitarian, suitable for transporting items in urban environments such as hospitals, offices, or service areas.
description: A sleek, metallic two-shelf trolley with curved side supports, dual handlebars, and four caster wheels, finished in a reflective metal.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the handlebar, raised shelf edges, and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both shelves, the curved frame, and all four wheels clearly.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view mirroring view 0, with the handlebar and shelf depth visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, showing both shelves, the frame, and wheels from the other side.
attribute_handle_type: dual handles, each a single horizontal bar made of metal, integrated into the frame at both ends, smooth and rounded for grip
attribute_wheel_arrangement: four wheels, one at each corner, likely all swivel for maneuverability
